exercise_requirement: Compare two or three frozen backbones, including convolutional and transformer families, with constant splits, resizing, metrics, and dense heads.
research_question: Which frozen pretrained representation best transfers to automotive-part classification and multimodal matching?
hypothesis: A modern convolutional backbone will provide strong efficiency, while a compact vision transformer may capture broader shape context.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
prerequisites: Explicit approval before downloading pretrained weights.
Record model license and exact weight revision.
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
